response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 19+ years of experience exceeding the 6+ requirement. Recent production experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS matches core stack. Notably has AI agent infrastructure experience from re:cinq, meeting a specific required skill. Solid database and DevOps knowledge. Main gaps are explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, and testing frameworks (though TDD philosophy is strong throughout career), and a current 6-month career gap requiring clarification on availability.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 19+ years in software development, including recent full-stack work with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct AI agent infrastructure experience from re:cinq aligns with specific job requirement; demonstrates knowledge of emerging technologies
Strong foundation in testing methodology and software craftsmanship throughout career; deployed to production at scale with TDD practices
concerns: Currently in 6-month career gap (caregiving, October 2025–present); availability and motivation to return need clarification
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite strong Node.js and testing background; would require technical verification
Background spans many languages and platforms; recent production work emphasizes pricing/data optimization rather than full-stack feature architecture

key_factors.factor: Recent full-stack production experience matches core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS)
AI agent infrastructure experience meets specific required skill
Current career gap and availability status
